1AKE.pdb_title: STRUCTURE OF THE COMPLEX BETWEEN ADENYLATE KINASE FROM ESCHERICHIA COLI AND THE INHIBITOR AP5A REFINED AT 1.9 ANGSTROMS RESOLUTION: A MODEL FOR A CATALYTIC TRANSITION STATE

4AKE.pdb_title: Structure of the apo form of Escherichia coli adenylate kinase

P69441.protein_names: Adenylate kinase (AK) (EC 2.7.4.3) (ATP-AMP transphosphorylase) (ATP:AMP phosphotransferase) (Adenylate monophosphate kinase)

P69441.function: Catalyzes the reversible transfer of the terminal phosphate group between ATP and AMP.
